case_title: PACIFIC TOWNHOUSE ASSOCIATION VS GOGOL, STEVE DBA S.J. GOGOL CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTF TO COMM. LASTOWSKI FORWARDED TO HIM FOR RESPONSE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC TOWNHOUSE ASSOCIATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOGOL, STEVE DBA S.J. GOGOL CONSTRUCTION NO CONTRACT REGARDING WATER INFILTRATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
